_instruction: Drug Product Description — dosage form and characteristics only. Order: header, description, dosage_form.

components.title: Dosage form and characteristics
components.prompt: Extract dosage form and characteristics into a 2-column table (Field, Value). Typical fields: Product Name, Generic Name, CAS Register No., Description/Appearance, Label Claim, Shelf Life, Storage Condition. Use dossier text exactly; correct obvious OCR spacing/punctuation only.
example: A white colour powder filled in Green/Ivory colour '3' size hard gelatin capsule.
Each hard gelatin capsule contains: Tacrolimus USP 1 mg; Excipients q.s; Approved colour used in hard gelatin capsule shell.
Store below 30°C. Protect from light. Keep the medicine out of reach of children.
